summary: Credit-based Payment System Testing for 'mumble' Language Tutor App - ALL TESTS PASSED. Backend: 23/23 pytest tests passed covering plans, subscription, conversation limits, credit checks, Razorpay orders, and payment verification. Frontend: All pages verified (Pricing, Credit History, Chat with sidebar) with correct pricing display and error handling.

pricing_page.plan_cards: PASSED - All 3 plan cards visible (Free, Plus, Pro)
pricing_page.current_plan_badge: PASSED - 'CURRENT PLAN' badge shows on user's plan
pricing_page.most_popular_badge: PASSED - 'MOST POPULAR' badge on Plus plan
pricing_page.upgrade_buttons: PASSED - 'Upgrade to Plus' and 'Upgrade to Pro' buttons visible

credit_history_page.filter_pills: PASSED - All, Usage, Purchases filter pills visible
credit_history_page.transaction_list: PASSED - Shows usage transactions (-3, -5, etc.) and purchase (+1000)
credit_history_page.credit_rates_info: PASSED - Credit Rates section shows LLM/STT/TTS rates

sidebar_elements.credits_badge: PASSED - Shows credits with plan name (e.g., '50 credits FREE')
sidebar_elements.pricing_link: PASSED - Pricing link visible in sidebar
sidebar_elements.credit_history_link: PASSED - Credit History link visible in sidebar
sidebar_elements.low_credits_warning: PASSED - Red indicator shows when credits are low/zero

error_handling.conversation_limit_toast: PASSED - Shows 'You've reached the maximum of 3 conversations on your plan. Please upgrade or delete an existing conversation.'
error_handling.credits_error_402: PASSED - Backend returns 402 with 'Insufficient credits. Please upgrade your plan.'

features_verified: GET /api/payments/plans returns Free ($0, 50 credits, 3 convs), Plus ($14.99, 1000 credits, 10 convs), Pro ($29.99, 5000 credits, unlimited)
GET /api/payments/subscription returns correct plan, credits, max_conversations for each user
POST /api/conversations returns 403 when Free user (3 convs) tries to create 4th conversation
POST /api/conversations returns 403 when Plus user (10 convs) tries to create 11th conversation
POST /api/conversations allows Pro user to create unlimited conversations
403 error includes actionable advice (upgrade or delete)
POST /api/conversations/{id}/messages returns 402 when user has 0 credits
POST /api/conversations/{id}/messages/stream returns 402 when user has 0 credits
POST /api/conversations/{id}/voice-message returns 402 when user has 0 credits
Users with credits can successfully send messages
POST /api/payments/create-order rejects 'free' plan with 400
POST /api/payments/create-order creates valid Razorpay order for 'plus' and 'pro'
POST /api/payments/verify-payment rejects invalid signature with 400
GET /api/payments/credit-history returns paginated transactions with type filtering
Frontend Pricing page shows 3 plan cards with correct prices
Frontend Pricing page shows 'Current Plan' badge for user's active plan
Frontend Credit History page shows filter pills and transaction list
Frontend Sidebar shows credit balance with plan name
Frontend Sidebar has Credit History and Pricing links
Frontend shows toast error when conversation limit reached
Frontend handles 402 credit error correctly
critical_code_review_comments: CORRECT: payments.py enforces plan limits and credit checks correctly
CORRECT: conversations.py checks max_conversations before creating new conversation
CORRECT: conversations.py checks credits before processing messages (both streaming and non-streaming)
CORRECT: voice.py checks credits before processing voice messages
CORRECT: credit_service.py properly calculates and deducts credits with transaction logging
CORRECT: PricingPage.js displays all 3 plans with correct pricing and Current Plan badge
CORRECT: CreditHistoryPage.js shows paginated transactions with filter pills
CORRECT: Sidebar.jsx shows CreditBadge with plan name and low credit warning
CORRECT: ChatPage.js handles 402 errors with toast and upgrade prompt
CORRECT: api.js has all payment-related API functions

test_credentials.free_user: free@test.com / password123 (Free plan, 50 credits, 3 convs - AT LIMIT)
test_credentials.plus_user: plus@test.com / password123 (Plus plan, 1000 credits, 10 convs - AT LIMIT)

seed_data_creation: Test users already seeded with plans and conversation counts
context_for_next_testing_agent: Credit-based payment system fully tested. Test users: free@test.com (3 convs at limit), plus@test.com (10 convs at limit), pro@test.com (unlimited), broke@test.com (0 credits). All message endpoints (non-streaming, streaming, voice) have credit checks returning 402. Conversation creation returns 403 when at plan limit. Razorpay is in TEST mode. verify-payment requires valid Razorpay signature.

mocked_api.Razorpay: In TEST mode with test keys (expected for development, not production)
